history.text: Ottoman Tripolitania appears in Libya's historical record.
Italian invasion of Libya changed control of the territory.
Libyan resistance movement appears in Libya's historical record.
Tripolitanian Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
The Kingdom of Libya emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Coup d'état by Muammar Gaddafi appears in Libya's historical record.
Great Socialist People's Libyan Arab Jamahiriya appears in Libya's historical record.
First Libyan Civil War marked a violent internal conflict that shaped Libya's modern politics.
